fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact involved in this interaction. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Contact Company No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact company.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that you have entered in the Date field in the Create Interaction wizard or the Segment window when you created the interaction. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the interaction.

fields.name: Information Flow
fields.tooltip: Specifies the direction of information flow recorded by the interaction. There are two options: Outbound (the information was received by your contact) and Inbound (the information was received by your company).

fields.name: Initiated By
fields.tooltip: Specifies who initiated the interaction. There are two options: Us (the interaction was initiated by your company) and Them (the interaction was initiated by your contact).

fields.name: Attachment No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the linked attachment is inherited or unique.

fields.name: Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of the interaction.

fields.name: Duration (Min.)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the duration of the interaction.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who logged this entry. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Interaction Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the interaction group used to create this interaction. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Interaction Template Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the interaction template used to create the interaction. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Campaign No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the campaign (if any) to which the interaction is linked. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Campaign Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the campaign entry to which the interaction log entry is linked.

fields.name: Campaign Response
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the interaction records a response to a campaign.

fields.name: Campaign Target
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the interaction is applied to contacts that are part of the campaign target. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Segment No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the segment. This field is valid only for interactions created for segments, and is not editable.

fields.name: Evaluation
fields.tooltip: Specifies the evaluation of the interaction. There are five options: Very Positive, Positive, Neutral, Negative, and Very Negative.

fields.name: Time of Interaction
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when the interaction was created. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Attempt Failed
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the interaction records an failed attempt to reach the contact. This field is not editable.

fields.name: To-do No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the task if the interaction has been created to complete a task. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the salesperson who carried out the interaction.

fields.name: Delivery Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the delivery of the attachment. There are three options:

fields.name: Canceled
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the interaction has been canceled. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Correspondence Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of correspondence of the attachment in the interaction template. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Contact Alt. Address Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the contact alternative address used for the interaction. The field is not editable.
If the field is blank, the interaction has been created using the contact's usual address.

fields.name: Logged Segment Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the logged segment (if any) to which the interaction log entry is linked.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document if there is one that the interaction log entry records. You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the document (if any) that the interaction log entry records.

fields.name: Version No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the version number of the document that the interaction log entry is related to.

fields.name: Doc. No. Occurrence
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of times the "No." value has been used in the number series.

fields.name: Contact Via
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number that you used when calling the contact.

fields.name: Send Word Docs. as Attmt.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that the Microsoft Word document has been sent as an attachment in the e-mail message.
This field is only valid if the interaction template attachment contains a Microsoft Word document and the correspondence type is E-Mail.

fields.name: Interaction Language Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the language code for the interaction for the interaction log. The code is copied from the language code of the interaction template, if one is specified.

fields.name: E-Mail Logged
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally. Prevents email messages from being logged twice.

fields.name: Subject
fields.tooltip: Specifies the subject text that will be used for this interaction.

fields.name: Contact Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact for which an interaction has been logged.

fields.name: Contact Company Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact company for which an interaction has been logged.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a comment exists for this interaction log entry.

fields.name: Opportunity No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the opportunity to which the interaction is linked.

fields.name: Postponed
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally. Specifies whether the interaction is postponed.
